top_findings.title: POST /books endpoint with validation
top_findings.evidence: src/books/handler.clj:63, create-book function validates title and author, returns 201 Created on success

top_findings.title: GET /books with author filter support
top_findings.evidence: src/books/handler.clj:64, list-books function handles optional author param; test/books/handler_test.clj:61-69 list-filter-test

top_findings.title: GET /books/{id} endpoint
top_findings.evidence: src/books/handler.clj:65, get-book function with ID lookup; test/books/handler_test.clj:44-54 create-and-get-test
